heading: Report by Secretary
label: 300b–17 Report by Secretary
notes: CodificationSection was enacted as part of the Newborn Screening Saves Lives Reauthorization Act of 2014, and not as part of the Public Health Service Act which comprises this chapter.

Prior ProvisionsPrior sections 300c to 300c–4 were repealed by , , .Pub. L. 94–278, title IV, § 403(a)90 Stat. 407Apr. 22, 1976Section 300c, , as added , , , authorized Secretary to make grants and enter contracts with public and private entities for establishment of screening, treatment, and counseling programs with respect to Cooley’s Anemia.act July 1, 1944, ch. 373, title XI, § 1111Pub. L. 92–414, § 386 Stat. 650Aug. 29, 1972Section 300c–1, , as added , , , required that any participation by an individual in any Cooley’s Anemia programs should be on a purely voluntary basis.act July 1, 1944, ch. 373, title XI, § 1112Pub. children.label: ii
children.text: screening children who have or are at risk for heritable disorders; and

children.label: B
children.text: not less than every 2 years, submit to such committees an updated version of such report.

children.label: A
children.text: the ongoing activities under sections 300b–8, 300b–9, and 300b–11 through 300b–14 of this title; and

children.label: B
children.text: the amounts expended on such activities.
